info.description: HTTP API for the Rootprint log management platform.
info.title: Rootprint API

get.summary: Get latency time series for an API key
Get recent searches for an API key
Get search activity summary for an API key
Get volume time series for an API key
Get top actors by search count
Get per-index usage breakdown for a user
Get latency time series for a user
Get recent searches for a user
Get search activity summary for a user
Get volume time series for a user

get.description: Returns whether the first-admin setup step still needs to be completed.
Returns which authentication providers are currently enabled.

post.description: Creates the initial admin account. Fails with 409 if setup is already done.
Sets or updates a credential-account password using a valid invite token.
Validates an invite token and returns the associated email address.

get.description: Export matching log entries as a gzip-compressed file. When dryRun=true, returns a JSON preflight estimate instead of streaming the file.

200.description: Gzip-compressed export stream. Content-Type reflects the requested format (application/x-ndjson for JSON, text/csv for CSV, text/plain for text).

post.description: Proxies an NDJSON (or JSON array) log payload to Quickwit for the index associated with the ingest API key. Accepts application/x-ndjson or application/json content-type. The response body is passed through from Quickwit.

OTLP/HTTP log exporter endpoint. Accepts only application/x-protobuf (ExportLogsServiceRequest). Returns an ExportLogsServiceResponse on success. All error responses use the google.rpc.Status encoding: 415 is JSON, all other errors are binary protobuf.

401.description: Missing or invalid ingest bearer token — google.rpc.Status (protobuf)

403.description: Ingest key does not have access to this index — google.rpc.Status (protobuf)
